name: Hup Seng Industries Bhd
summary: Hup Seng Industries Bhd is a Malaysia-based investment holding company involved in the manufacturing and sale of biscuits, confectionery, and other food products. Their popular brands include Hup Seng Cream Crackers and various other biscuit and snack offerings. The company is headquartered in Batu Pahat, Johor, Malaysia.
